---
title: "Gender-Social-Media-Analysis"
author: "Eliana"
date: "2026-03-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(readr)

d_social_media <- read_csv('../data/BES-2017-f2f-gender-fb-tw.csv')
```

# Hypothesis

H1 Gender is associated with Facebook use
